hero.name: João Victor de Souza Brayner
hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.description: Currently I work as a fullstack developer at Pitang

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know a little more about my journey
about.description: I am a fullstack developer with a focus on backend, with experience in developing REST APIs and distributed systems. I work with technologies such as C#, .NET, Java (Spring Boot), Python (Django), as well as TypeScript/JavaScript with React and Next.js on the frontend. I have experience with different architectural patterns, including microservices and modular monoliths, applying Clean Architecture principles to ensure scalability, maintainability and low coupling. I also have familiarity with practices such as DDD (Domain-Driven Design), CQRS and event-driven architectures, contributing to building more decoupled and resilient systems. In the data ecosystem, I work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server and Oracle, as well as using Redis for caching and performance optimization in applications. I have experience with data modeling, query optimization and service integration. Currently I work at Pitang, for 1 year, on the Grande Recife Transport Consortium project, contributing to the development and evolution of critical systems, focusing on performance, service integration and maintenance of production applications. Previously, I worked as an intern at Grande Recife itself, where I had direct contact with real systems and participated in relevant deliveries. I also have experience with containerization using Docker, as well as development practices such as versioning with Git, layer organization and consistent application of best development practices.

items.description: I work as a freelancer developing customized solutions for clients, focusing on backend and system integrations.
I worked as an intern on the Grande Recife project, where I had direct contact with real systems and participated in relevant deliveries.
I work on the development and evolution of software solutions, focusing on backend, APIs and system integrations.
highlights: REST API development with .NET and ASP.NET Core
Participation in system design and software architecture decisions
Integration with legacy systems and external services
Data modeling and manipulation in relational databases
Performance optimization and bug fixes in production
Application of best practices (Clean Architecture, Git versioning)

items.description: Undergraduate degree in Systems Analysis and Development, focusing on software and systems development.

items.name: Course equivalent to the Programming Logic discipline of college. We will use C# as the language and Visual Studio.
The most didactic and complete C# and OOP course: composition, inheritance, collections, files, LINQ, lambda, delegates and much more
Web Development with Python and Django Framework: Essentials
The essentials for creating Web APIs on the .NET platform
Master ASP .NET 10 Swagger Docker Kubernetes REST Web API RESTful JWT xUnit Testcontainers React JS from 0 to Azure, GCP and more
API AUTH
items.description: Centralized authentication and authorization API for multiple systems, with RBAC support and multi-tenant architecture, ensuring data isolation, scalability and granular access control. Developed with C#, ASP.NET Core and PostgreSQL, following Clean Architecture, DDD and patterns such as CQRS and MediatR.

items.name: API CATALOG
items.description: Product catalog API, designed to provide scalable and secure endpoints, with product, category and inventory management. Developed in C# with ASP.NET Core and PostgreSQL, using Entity Framework Core and layered architecture.

items.name: FIRE CONTROL CENTER API
items.description: Backend for the fire monitoring and control system of the Pernambuco Fire Department, developed in Java with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL. Implements layered architecture, dependency injection and modularization, ensuring reliability and efficient system maintenance.

items.name: FALA AGRO
items.description: Ticket sales website for agricultural sector events, developed as an academic project. Implements interactive and responsive interface using React with Vite, TypeScript and Mantine, focusing on user experience and navigation speed.

items.name: RUMO - GRANDE RECIFE
items.description: Public transportation consultation platform for the Metropolitan Region of Recife, allowing access to detailed information about lines, itineraries, stops and schedules. Developed with Django (MVT architecture), Python, JavaScript, MySQL and SQL Server, facilitating urban mobility and improving the user experience of the bus system.

items.name: VIRTUAL TERMINAL - GRANDE RECIFE
items.description: Digital services web platform for public transportation users in the Metropolitan Region of Recife, offering features such as requesting a second copy of the VEM card, credit recharge, limit increase and protocol consultation. Developed with Django (MVT architecture), Python, JavaScript and MySQL, centralizing essential urban mobility services.

items.name: TICKETING - GRANDE RECIFE
items.description: Electronic ticketing system for public transportation in the Metropolitan Region of Recife, responsible for passenger control, ticket validation and report generation. Developed in C# with ASP.NET Core and PostgreSQL, using Docker and Entity Framework Core to ensure accuracy, reliability and scalability.

items.name: OPERATOR REMUNERATION - GRANDE RECIFE
items.description: Remuneration calculation system for public transportation operators in the Metropolitan Region of Recife, consolidating trip data, schedules and other sources to generate accurate payment calculations for operators. Developed with Python and Django Ninja (REST API), PostgreSQL and Docker, using modular monolith architecture for scalability and efficient maintenance.
